column3: Acyuta Priya Das is a spiritual teacher associated with the International Society for Krishna Consciousness (ISKCON). He has been involved in preaching the teachings of Gaudiya Vaishnavism and spreading devotional service to Krishna through lectures, writings, and spiritual guidance.
